key_findings: Cumulative calculation methodology verified: records sorted by expense_date with record_id tiebreaker; manually confirmed D002 crossing at index 156 (cumulative through 155 = 107,673.63, under budget; with R000415 = 108,327.03, over budget by 541.61).

Special approval check complete: zero special_approval records found in all 6 over-budget departments (D001-D006). Policy Article 13 (01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md) and Article 4 (08_budget_management.md) require special approval for post-budget spending; none exists.
D007-D010 verified under budget: D007 usage_rate=0.8378, D008=0.7786, D009=0.8327, D010=0.8482, all below 1.0x threshold. No anomalous records from these departments.
No exact budget-boundary records found in any department; cumulative sums cross the 1.0x threshold cleanly.
No duplicate record IDs detected within or across departments; all 1,196 candidate records are unique.
Invoice reuse (6 instances) confined to D007/D008 (under-budget departments), all marked as synthetic injection samples; no impact on D001-D006 findings.
Count arithmetic consistent: anomalous_count = total_records - first_crossing_index + 1 for all 6 departments; sum of anomalous records = 1,196 matches candidate_count.
All 3,088 in-scope records (D001-D006) accounted for; no records omitted from cumulative calculation.
